method: teacher-forced greedy agreement over the frozen 20-trace corpus (12,092 tokens): both models consume identical prefixes (the trace tokens) and their per-position greedy argmax streams are compared. Draft = Q3_K_M on the Camelid resident GPU engine; verifier = Q8_0 on the Camelid CPU int8x18 path (the fast-kernel verifier candidate; Q6_K subset equivalence check separate). Verify cost = measured marginal batched-prefill time for +k tokens.

rates.baseline_desc: llama.cpp acd79d6 Q6_K -ngl 22 partial offload, tg64 (best measured verifier-quality baseline on this box)

q6k_verifier_option.agreement: not measured — dominated before measurement completed
q6k_verifier_option.verify_cost: DNF: the Q6_K batched 120-token prefill on the runnable CPU lane (generic dequant; no fast K-quant kernel) did not complete ONE measurement in >20 minutes, vs Q8_0 at ~19s. Q8_0 strictly dominates as the verifier: higher fidelity than Q6_K, in-RAM (9.5GB/15.7GB), and owns the only fast CPU kernel (int8x18 maddubs).

sensitivity.to_flip_GO_at_k4: net >= 12.86 tok/s requires round <= 0.286s: draft >= 14 tok/s AND verify(k=4) <= 0.286s — BOTH legs must ~2x
sensitivity.draft_leg: GPU headroom real (llama.cpp decodes Q4_K_M at ~40 tok/s on this silicon vs our 10.06 on Q3_K_M) — a kernel-perf item could plausibly reach 20+ tok/s
sensitivity.verify_leg: CPU batched verify measured 0.157 s/token (slope, warm); the pure weights-bandwidth floor for a k-token batch is ~0.31s (9.5GB @ ~31GB/s) — verify(k=4) can at BEST halve to ~0.31s, still > 0.286s
sensitivity.conclusion: Even with an optimistic 2x draft AND bandwidth-floor verify, net(k=4) = 3.68/0.31 = 11.9 tok/s < 12.86 bar. The Inverted-Bactrian premise does not close on this box against the llama.cpp Q6_K-partial baseline. NO-GO is structural, not a tuning shortfall.

camelid_internal_framing: net 5.91 tok/s at Q8_0-verified output = 1.8x Camelid's own Q8_0 CPU lane (~3.3 tok/s). A real capability point, but NOT the conductor bar; not promoted.
conductor_disposition: Per Item 5 kill criterion: NO-GO receipt written; the Item 4 full-residency Q3_K_M@16K lane (RECEIPT_ITEM4_residency.json) is the promoted deliverable; Items 6-7 do not run. The conductor records a clean NO-GO as a successful outcome.
